personal.preferred_title: Software Engineer III | AWS Data Engineering, ETL, Spark, Python

summary: Senior data/software engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience, including financial-services production systems, AWS data platform modernization, Python/SQL ETL, Spark/PySpark-oriented processing, and operationally reliable data pipelines. Strong background transforming legacy data flows into cloud-ready pipelines, building governed reporting and forecasting datasets, troubleshooting production issues, and improving data quality across upstream and downstream consumers. Experienced with AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, EC2/ECS, Oracle, SQL optimization, Python automation, CI/CD concepts, Docker, Linux/Unix, and Agile delivery. Currently extending production AWS/Spark experience into Databricks, Snowflake, Delta Lake, Terraform, and Kafka/Flink concepts without overstating hands-on depth.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and maintained production Python/Pandas and PySpark-oriented ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints, replacing manual processing with repeatable data flows used for analytics, forecasting, and operational decisions.
Modernized on-premise data processing patterns into AWS-based data platform components using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, EC2, ECS, and cloud-oriented pipeline design.
Designed optimized Oracle and Redshift-backed schemas for historical telemetry retention, forecasting workloads, reporting access, and downstream data analysis.
Implemented validation, reconciliation, completeness checks, and data quality controls across monitoring feeds to improve trust in production reporting outputs.
Integrated data from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM, and AppDynamics into unified reporting pipelines, troubleshooting upstream/downstream breaks and resolving data inconsistency issues.

Built forecasting pipelines using Python, Prophet, and scikit-learn to identify capacity risks months ahead, enabling platform teams to act before infrastructure bottlenecks reached production impact.
Created Streamlit and SQL-backed dashboards for senior stakeholders, translating complex telemetry and platform data into clear operational insights.
Supported production issue investigation, root-cause analysis, release coordination, documentation, and Agile delivery across regulated financial-services environments.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for revenue-critical hospitality systems and turned performance telemetry into actionable analytics for engineering teams.
Led the FAST project, data-mining real-user and synthetic performance data from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities adopted by application teams.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile systems, improving visibility into data flows, user experience, and service health.
Contributed to AWS migration planning by evaluating monitoring readiness, operational risk, and platform performance considerations.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and management modules that standardized monitoring, troubleshooting, and operational support workflows.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate weekly performance reporting, replacing manual exports with repeatable processing routines.
Partnered with J2EE, WebLogic, database, and operations teams to troubleshoot production bottlenecks and document root-cause findings.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction correctness and sub-second query behavior.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing routines to verify migration accuracy across high-volume transactional datasets.
Optimized database access patterns and transaction-processing logic, reducing hardware footprint while maintaining mission-critical performance.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Programming & Query: Python, SQL, PySpark, Apache Spark, Java, PL/SQL, C++, Perl, Korn Shell, JSON
skills.AWS & Cloud Data: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts, cloud migration patterns, data lake architecture
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, batch processing, Spark fundamentals, data lake pipelines, data warehouse integration, data modeling, schema design, schema evolution concepts, historical data retention, upstream/downstream impact analysis
skills.Data Quality & Stability: Data validation, reconciliation, completeness checks, consistency checks, root-cause analysis, production support, operational stability, monitoring, troubleshooting, incident-oriented documentation
skills.Databricks / Lakehouse Growth Areas: Databricks concepts, Delta Lake concepts, medallion architecture, Apache Parquet, partitioning, clustering concepts, Snowflake concepts; actively upskilling from AWS/PySpark background
skills.Engineering Practices: Git, CI/CD concepts, testing discipline, release discipline, Docker, Linux/Unix, Agile/Scrum/Kanban, technical documentation, code review collaboration
skills.Messaging / Streaming Awareness: Kafka concepts, Flink concepts, event-driven architecture awareness; MQ Series legacy messaging background
skills.Financial Services: Regulated banking environments, production data platforms, capacity forecasting, payments/banking-adjacent systems, stakeholder reporting, operational risk awareness

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark-oriented forecasting platform that transforms infrastructure telemetry into curated datasets, predictive models, and stakeholder dashboards for capacity risk decisions.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed an AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and Bedrock to support analytics and AI-enabled data access use cases.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic workflow using Python, semantic duplicate detection, vector embeddings, LLM scoring, JSON quality gates, and automated artifact generation.
